data.title: BitMart launches BUBB (BUBB) for the first time
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BitMart announced that it will launch BUBB (BUBB) for the first time at 12:00 (Eastern Time) on March 21, and the BUBB/USDT trading pair will be opened.

data.title: Warpcast adds Farcaster earnings page
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Warpcast has added a new Farcaster income page, which supports viewing all rewards on one page.

data.title: Bitget PoolX project BR yield is temporarily reported at 539.85% APR
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget PoolX project BR is now open for investment. As of the time of posting, the current BR reward pool yield is temporarily reported at 539.85% APR. The upper limit of personal lock-up is 6 million BR, and the lock-up channel is open from 22:00 on March 20 to 22:00 on March 27 (UTC+8).

data.title: Hong Kong-listed company EDA Group Holdings plans to spend up to $5 million on cryptocurrency
data.description: Hong Kong-listed company EDA Group Holdings issued a voluntary announcement, disclosing that the company's board of directors proposed a cryptocurrency purchase plan with a total amount not exceeding US$5 million. The company is currently exploring blockchain technology to empower the cross-border e-commerce logistics industry to promote cross-border commodity full-link traceability and cryptocurrency B2B settlement. In addition, EDA Group Holdings announced that it will set up a department specifically responsible for managing and supervising virtual asset business and conducting risk control.

data.title: Crypto Market Sentiment Dips as Fear and Greed Index Falls
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Alternative data indicates that the Crypto Fear and Greed Index has dropped to 31 today, down from 49 yesterday, with last week's average at 27. This suggests that market sentiment remains in a state of 'fear.'

The Fear and Greed Index, which ranges from 0 to 100, is calculated based on several factors: volatility (25%), market trading volume (25%), social media activity (15%), market surveys (15%), Bitcoin's dominance in the market (10%), and Google Trends analysis (10%).

data.title: Bitcoin Bull Market Index Hits Two-Year Low, Suggesting Bearish Trends
data.description: According to PANews, CryptoQuant has reported on the X platform that the Bitcoin bull market index has dropped to its lowest point in two years, reaching a score of just 20. Bitcoin has fallen 23% from its peak, and historical data indicates that a strong rebound typically occurs only when the index exceeds 60. The persistent low index is often associated with bearish market conditions.

data.title: Bithumb newly listed Pax Gold (PAXG)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: South Korean cryptocurrency trading platform Bithumb has added Pax Gold (PAXG) and supports KRW trading pairs.

data.title: Binance to launch multi-currency quarterly delivery contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the USDⓈ-M and COIN-M quarterly 0926 delivery contracts after 08:00 (UTC) on March 28, 2025. USDⓈ-M quarterly contracts include BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT, and COIN-M quarterly contracts include BTCUSD, ETHUSD, BNBUSD, ADAUSD, LINKUSD, BCHUSD, XRPUSD, DOTUSD, LTCUSD and SOLUSD. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees Mixed Performance with Notable Gains and Losses
data.description:
According to PANews, several cryptocurrencies have shown significant fluctuations in their daily performance. Leading the gains, WIF is currently priced at $0.528, marking an 8.63% increase. NOT follows with a price of $0.00257, up by 5.36%, while PEOPLE is valued at $0.0175, reflecting a 4.04% rise. INJ and AAVE also saw increases, with INJ at $10.088, up 3.64%, and AAVE at $180.38, rising by 3.60%.

Conversely, some cryptocurrencies experienced declines. RAY is priced at $1.741, showing a 2.69% decrease. ATOM follows with a price of $4.703, down by 1.63%. SUI is valued at $2.361, reflecting a 1.37% drop, while XTZ and ILV also saw decreases, with XTZ at $0.709, down 0.87%, and ILV at $14.37, declining by 0.76%.
